title: gerah #1626
definition:
1) gerah, a weight, a 20th part of a shekel, equal to the weight of
    16 barley grains or 4 to 5 carob beans
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) gerah, a weight, a 20th part of a shekel, equal to the weight of
    16 barley grains or 4 to 5 carob beans

    NASB:  a gerah (one-twentieth of a shekel)
